name: Peanut Butter Oatmeal Chippers
recipeInstructions:
Cream butter; gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add egg, and beat well. Add water and vanilla, mixing well. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg; stir into the creamed mixture, mixing well. Stir in oats, pecans (if desired), and peanut butter morsels. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool slightly on cookie sheets; remove to wire racks to cool completely.
Yield: about 8 dozen.
